notes: Silhouette roughly tracks the photo's dorsal-view pose with mantle, fins, head and the two long tentacles in the right places, but linework is broken and stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore shading.
specific_issues: outline has small breaks and stippled noise along the silhouette edge
stipple is randomly distributed rather than concentrated in the orange chromatophore band on the mantle
arms render as smooth blobs with no ring-shaped suckers
tentacular clubs not articulated — no sucker detail at the club tips visible in the photo
eye is a tiny dot rather than an almond with a filled pupil
fin shape is blocky/angular rather than the soft rhomboidal fin in the photo
head/arm crown reads as a five-pointed star rather than a clear arm crown with eight arms plus two tentacles
interior fin/mantle boundary line is fragmented
